data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: The operation could not be completed.

data.name: DuplicateRoomNumber
data.value: A room with number {0} already exists in this hotel.

data.name: InvalidStatus
data.value: The room status must be one of the allowed values: {0}.

data.name: InvalidRoomType
data.value: The room type must be one of the allowed values: {0}.

data.name: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Price per hour must be greater than zero
data.value: Price per hour must be greater than zero

data.name: Room number must have 1 to 20 characters
data.value: Room number must have 1 to 20 characters

data.name: Status must be available cleaning or maintenance
data.value: Status must be available cleaning or maintenance

data.name: Type must be Standard Deluxe or Suite
data.value: Type must be Standard Deluxe or Suite
